subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Upon thee be My glory! Hearken unto My remembrance and My call, and unto that which appeareth from the Kingdom of Mine utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد علیک بهائی ان استمع ذکری و ندائی و ما یظهر من ملکوت بیانی لاحد
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual transformation, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
